title: Library of Congress Harlem Renaissance Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for Harlem Renaissance primary sources and classroom materials.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: The Library of Congress Harlem Renaissance source set supports study of literature, music, visual art, migration, identity, and cultural movements.
Use this source for interdisciplinary reading that combines history, art analysis, biography, and close reading.
Library of Congress source sets include public-domain and rights-unknown primary sources. Use the item pages to confirm rights before mirroring individual documents.
